# Development Log

## 1. AI Coding Assistant Used
* I used chatgpt and claude as my AI coding assistant for this project.

## 2. AI Model Used
* I used Gemini's latest model capabilities to generate and debug code.

## 3. Important Prompts Given
* "Create a Streamlit application structure for a content planning tool."
* "Integrate Groq API for content generation in Python."
* "Help me format the README and development log according to specific project requirements."

## 4. Code Generated by AI
* The basic boilerplate for the Streamlit UI.
* The function logic to connect and fetch responses from the Groq API.
* The structure for the requirements and README files.

## 5. Manual Modifications Made
* Adjusted the UI layout for better user experience.
* Manually configured the API key management to keep it secure.
* Edited the generated text to match my project's specific "Content Planner" logic.

## 6. Challenges Faced
* Managing API authentication securely within the Streamlit environment.
* Formatting the GitHub repository to include all mandatory files as per guidelines.

## 7. Lessons Learned
* Learned how to effectively prompt AI to generate functional boilerplate code.
* Gained experience in structuring professional project documentation (README and Logs).
* Better understanding of the end-to-end deployment process for AI applications.
